revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 19 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 19 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月19日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[弘仁]]元年（[[810年]]_月_日） - 弘仁に改元 * [[昌泰]]2年（[[899年]]_月_日） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]]足柄坂・[[上野国]][[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]]に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]]元年（[[1235年]]_月_日） - 地震頻発のため嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]]元年（[[1324年]]_月_日） - [[正中の変]]。六波羅探題が兵を遣し、鎌倉幕府討滅を企てた後醍醐天皇方の土岐頼兼らを殺害。日野資朝・俊基を捕える * [[明治]]3年（[[1870年]]_月_日） - [[平民]]も[[苗字]]を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[応安]]元年/[[正平]]23年（[[1368年]]_月_日） - [[上杉憲顕]]、[[関東管領]]（* [[1306年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月18日 (旧暦)|9月18日]] 翌日[[9月20日 (旧暦)|9月20日]] - 前月[[8月19日 (旧暦)|8月19日]] 翌月[[10月19日 (旧暦)|10月19日]] *新暦[[9月19日]]
{{msg:stub}}

'''旧暦9月19日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[大同]]5年（[[810年]]_月_日） - [[弘仁]]に改元 * [[昌泰]]2年（[[899年]]_月_日） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]]足柄坂・[[上野国]][[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]]に関を設置 * [[文暦]]2年（[[1235年]]_月_日） - 地震頻発のため[[嘉禎]]に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]]元年（[[1324年]]_月_日） - [[正中の変]]。六波羅探題が兵を遣し、鎌倉幕府討滅を企てた後醍醐天皇方の土岐頼兼らを殺害。日野資朝・俊基を捕える * [[明治]]3年（[[1870年]]_月_日） - [[平民]]も[[苗字]]を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[応安]]元年/[[正平]]23年（[[1368年]]_月_日） - [[上杉憲顕]]、[[関東管領]]（* [[1306年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月18日 (旧暦)|9月18日]] 翌日[[9月20日 (旧暦)|9月20日]] - 前月[[8月19日 (旧暦)|8月19日]] 翌月[[10月19日 (旧暦)|10月19日]] *新暦[[9月19日]]

== できごと == * [[弘仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[810年]][[10月20日]]） - [[大同]]から弘仁に改元 * [[昌泰]]2年（ユリウス暦[[899年]][[10月27日]]） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]]足柄坂・[[上野国]][[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]]に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1235年]][[11月1日]]） - 地震頻発のため[[文暦]]から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1324年]][[10月7日]]） - [[正中の変]]。[[六波羅探題]]が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]]討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]]方の[[土岐頼兼]]らを殺害。[[日野資朝]]・[[俊基]]を捕える * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[10月13日]]） - [[平民]]も[[苗字]]を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月19日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[弘仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[810年]][[10月20日]]） - [[大同 (日本)|大同]]から弘仁に[[改元]] * [[昌泰]]2年（ユリウス暦[[899年]][[10月27日]]） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]]足柄坂・[[上野国]][[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]]に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1235年]][[11月1日]]） - [[地震]]頻発のため[[文暦]]から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1324年]][[10月7日]]） - [[正中の変]]。[[六波羅探題]]が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]]討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]]方の[[土岐頼兼]]、[[多治見国長]]らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]]・[[日野俊基|俊基]]らを捕える * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[10月13日]]） - [[平民]]も[[苗字]]を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== 誕生日 == *[[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[10月22日]]） - [[長岡護美]]、[[外交官]]、[[華族]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1906年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]23年（ユリウス暦[[1368年]][[10月31日]]） - [[上杉憲顕]]、[[関東管領]]（* [[1306年]]）

{{Lunar September}} '''September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 19'''<!--Lunar September19--> is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
== Events == * [[弘仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[810年]][[10月20日]]） - [[大同 (日本)|大同]]から弘仁に[[改元]] * [[昌泰]]2年（ユリウス暦[[899年]][[10月27日]]） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]]足柄坂・[[上野国]][[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]]に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1235年]][[11月1日]]） - [[地震]]頻発のため[[文暦]]から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1324年]][[10月7日]]） - [[正中の変]]。[[六波羅探題]]が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]]討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]]方の[[土岐頼兼]]、[[多治見国長]]らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]]・[[日野俊基|俊基]]らを捕える * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[10月13日]]） - [[平民]]も[[苗字]]を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== Births == *[[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[10月22日]]） - [[長岡護美]]、[[外交官]]、[[華族]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1906年]]）
== Deaths == * [[応安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]23年（ユリウス暦[[1368年]][[10月31日]]） - [[上杉憲顕]]、[[関東管領]]（* [[1306年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先負]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

[[sn:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[zh:九月十九]] [[en:draft:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[弘仁]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[810]][[10月20日]]） - [[大同 (日本)|大同]]から弘仁に[[改元]] * [[昌泰]]2年（ユリウス暦[[899]][[10月27日]]） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]]足柄坂・[[上野国]][[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]]に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1235]][[11月1日]]） - [[地震]]頻発のため[[文暦]]から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1324]][[10月7日]]） - [[正中の変]]。[[六波羅探題]]が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]]討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]]方の[[土岐頼兼]]、[[多治見国長]]らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]]・[[日野俊基|俊基]]らを捕える * [[明治]]3年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1870]][[10月13日]]） - [[平民]]も[[苗字]]を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== Births == *[[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842]][[10月22日]]） - [[長岡護美]]、[[外交官]]、[[華族]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1906]]）

[[sn:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[zh:九月十九]] [[en:draft:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[弘仁]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[810]][[10月20日]]） - [[大同 (日本)|大同]]から弘仁に[[改元]] * [[昌泰]]2nd year（ユリウス暦[[899]][[10月27日]]） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]]足柄坂・[[上野国]][[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]]に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1235]][[11月1日]]） - [[地震]]頻発のため[[文暦]]から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]]1st year（ユリウス暦[[1324]][[10月7日]]） - [[正中の変]]。[[六波羅探題]]が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]]討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]]方の[[土岐頼兼]]、[[多治見国長]]らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]]・[[日野俊基|俊基]]らを捕える * [[明治]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1870]][[10月13日]]） - [[平民]]も[[苗字]]を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== Births == *[[天保]]13rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1842]][[10月22日]]） - [[長岡護美]]、[[外交官]]、[[華族]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1906]]）
== Deaths == * [[応安]]1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]23rd year（ユリウス暦[[1368]][[10月31日]]） - [[上杉憲顕]]、[[関東管領]]（* [[1306]]）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.

revision.text:
[[sn:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[zh:九月十九]] [[en:draft:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[弘仁]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[810]][[10月20日]]） - [[大同 (日本)|大同]]から弘仁に[[改元]] * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰}}2nd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[899]][[10月27日]]） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]]足柄坂・[[上野国]][[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]]に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1235]][[11月1日]]） - [[地震]]頻発のため[[文暦]]から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]]1st year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1324]][[10月7日]]） - [[正中の変]]。[[六波羅探題]]が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]]討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]]方の[[土岐頼兼]]、[[多治見国長]]らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]]・[[日野俊基|俊基]]らを捕える * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1870]][[10月13日]]） - [[平民]]も[[苗字]]を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== Births == *{{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}13rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1842]][[10月22日]]） - [[長岡護美]]、[[外交官]]、[[華族]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1906]]）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}}1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]23rd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1368]][[10月31日]]） - [[上杉憲顕]]、[[関東管領]]（* [[1306]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919}}

[[sn:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[zh:九月十九]] [[en:draft:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[弘仁]]1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[810]][[10月20日]]） - [[大同 (日本)|大同]]から弘仁に[[改元]] * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰}}2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[899]][[10月27日]]） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]]足柄坂・[[上野国]][[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]]に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]]1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1235]][[11月1日]]） - [[地震]]頻発のため[[文暦]]から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]]1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1324]][[10月7日]]） - [[正中の変]]。[[六波羅探題]]が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]]討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]]方の[[土岐頼兼]]、[[多治見国長]]らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]]・[[日野俊基|俊基]]らを捕える * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]][[10月13日]]） - [[平民]]も[[苗字]]を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== Births == *{{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]][[10月22日]]） - [[長岡護美]]、[[外交官]]、[[華族]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1906]]）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}}1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]23rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1368]][[10月31日]]） - [[上杉憲顕]]、[[関東管領]]（* [[1306]]）

[[sn:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[zh:九月十九]] [[en:draft:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[810]] [[10月20日]] ） - [[Daidō]] から弘仁に[[改元]] * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[899]] [[10月27日]] ） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]] 足柄坂・[[上野国]] [[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]] に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1235]] [[11月1日]] ） - [[地震]] 頻発のため[[文暦]] から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1324]] [[10月7日]] ） - [[正中の変]] 。[[六波羅探題]] が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]] 討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]] 方の[[土岐頼兼]] 、[[多治見国長]] らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]] ・[[日野俊基|俊基]] らを捕える * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[10月13日]] ） - [[平民]] も[[苗字]] を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== Births == *{{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[10月22日]] ） - [[長岡護美]] 、[[外交官]] 、[[華族]] 、[[政治家]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 23rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1368]] [[10月31日]] ） - [[上杉憲顕]] 、[[関東管領]] （* [[1306]] ）

[[sn:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[zh:九月十九]] [[en:draft:September 19 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[810]] [[10月20日]] ） - [[Daidō]] から弘仁に[[改元]] * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[899]] [[10月27日]] ） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]] 足柄坂・[[上野国]] [[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]] に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1235]] [[11月1日]] ） - [[地震]] 頻発のため[[文暦]] から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1324]] [[10月7日]] ） - [[正中の変]] 。[[六波羅探題]] が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]] 討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]] 方の[[土岐頼兼]] 、[[多治見国長]] らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]] ・[[日野俊基|俊基]] らを捕える * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[10月13日]] ） - [[平民]] も[[苗字]] を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== Births == *{{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[10月22日]] ） - [[長岡護美]] 、[[外交官]] 、[[華族]] 、[[政治家]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 23rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1368]] [[10月31日]] ） - [[上杉憲顕]] 、[[関東管領]] （* [[1306]] ）

[[sn:September 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[zh:九月十九]] [[en:draft:September 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[810]] [[October 20]] ） - [[Daidō]] から弘仁に[[改元]] * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[899]] [[October 27]] ） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]] 足柄坂・[[上野国]] [[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]] に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1235]] [[November 1]] ） - [[地震]] 頻発のため[[文暦]] から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1324]] [[October 7]] ） - [[正中の変]] 。[[六波羅探題]] が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]] 討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]] 方の[[土岐頼兼]] 、[[多治見国長]] らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]] ・[[日野俊基|俊基]] らを捕える * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[October 13]] ） - [[平民]] も[[苗字]] を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== Births == *{{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[October 22]] ） - [[長岡護美]] 、[[外交官]] 、[[華族]] 、[[政治家]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 23rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1368]] [[October 31]] ） - [[上杉憲顕]] 、[[関東管領]] （* [[1306]] ）
== See Also ==

== Events == * [[弘仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[810]] [[October 20]] ） - [[Daidō]] から弘仁に[[改元]] * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[899]] [[October 27]] ） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]] 足柄坂・[[上野国]] [[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]] に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1235]] [[November 1]] ） - [[地震]] 頻発のため[[文暦]] から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1324]] [[October 7]] ） - [[正中の変]] 。[[六波羅探題]] が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]] 討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]] 方の[[土岐頼兼]] 、[[多治見国長]] らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]] ・[[日野俊基|俊基]] らを捕える * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[October 13]] ） - [[平民]] も[[苗字]] を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== Births == *{{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[October 22]] ） - [[長岡護美]] 、[[外交官]] 、[[華族]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 23rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1368]] [[October 31]] ） - [[上杉憲顕]] 、[[関東管領]] （* [[1306]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[鎌倉幕府]]" to "[[Kamakura shogunate]]"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[zh:九月十九]] [[en:draft:September 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[810]] [[October 20]] ） - [[Daidō]] から弘仁に[[改元]] * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[899]] [[October 27]] ） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]] 足柄坂・[[上野国]] [[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]] に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1235]] [[November 1]] ） - [[Earthquake]] 頻発のため[[文暦]] から嘉禎に改元 * [[Shōchū (元号)|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1324]] [[October 7]] ） - [[Shōchūの変]] 。[[六波羅探題]] が兵を遣し、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]] 方の[[土岐頼兼]] 、[[多治見国長]] らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]] ・[[日野俊基|俊基]] らを捕える * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[October 13]] ） - [[平民]] も[[苗字]] を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== Births == *{{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[October 22]] ） - [[長岡護美]] 、[[外交官]] 、[[Kazoku]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1368]] [[October 31]] ） - [[上杉憲顕]] 、[[関東管領]] （* [[1306]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919}}

[[sn:September 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[zh:九月十九]] [[en:draft:September 19 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[弘仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[810]] [[October 20]] ） - [[Daidō]] から弘仁に[[改元]] * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[899]] [[October 27]] ） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]] 足柄坂・[[上野国]] [[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]] に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1235]] [[November 1]] ） - [[Earthquake]] 頻発のため[[文暦]] から嘉禎に改元 * [[Shōchū (元号)|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1324]] [[October 7]] ） - [[Shōchūの変]] 。[[六波羅探題]] が兵を遣し、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]] 方の[[土岐頼兼]] 、[[多治見国長]] らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]] ・[[日野俊基|俊基]] らを捕える * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[October 13]] ） - [[平民]] も[[苗字]] を附けることが許される。5th year 後に義務化
== Births == *{{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[October 22]] ） - [[長岡護美]] 、[[外交官]] 、[[Kazoku]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1368]] [[October 31]] ） - [[上杉憲顕]] 、[[関東管領]] （* [[1306]] ）

== Events == * [[弘仁]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[810]] [[October 20]] ） - [[Daidō]] から弘仁に[[改元]] * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[899]] [[October 27]] ） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]] 足柄坂・[[上野国]] [[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]] に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1235]] [[November 1]] ） - [[Earthquake]] 頻発のため[[文暦]] から嘉禎に改元 * [[Shōchū (元号)|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1324]] [[October 7]] ） - [[Shōchūの変]] 。[[六波羅探題]] が兵を遣し、[[Kamakura shogunate]] 討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]] 方の[[土岐頼兼]] 、[[多治見国長]] らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]] ・[[日野俊基|俊基]] らを捕える * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[October 13]] ） - [[平民]] も[[苗字]] を附けることが許される。5th year 後に義務化
== Births == *{{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 13rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1842]] [[October 22]] ） - [[長岡護美]] 、[[外交官]] 、[[Kazoku]] 、[[politician]] （+ [[1906]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安}} 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1368]] [[October 31]] ） - [[上杉憲顕]] 、[[関東管領]] （* [[1306]] ）

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kōnin|ja|弘仁}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[810]] {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}) – {{ill|Daidō|ja|大同}} から{{ill|Kōnin|ja|弘仁}}に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元}}. * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[899]] {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日}}) – 群盗横行のため、{{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国}} の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂}}・{{ill|Ueno Province|ja|上野国}} {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂}} に関を設置. * {{ill|Katei|ja|嘉禎}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1235]] {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Earthquake|ja|地震}} 頻発のため、{{ill|Bunryaku|ja|文暦}} から{{ill|Katei|ja|嘉禎}}に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元}}. * {{ill|Shōchū|ja|正中}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1324]] {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日}}) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変}}. {{ill|Rokuhara Tandai|ja|六波羅探題}} dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇}}—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1870]] {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日}}) – {{ill|Commoners|ja|平民}} were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kōnin|ja|弘仁|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[810]] {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Daidō|ja|大同|12=draft}} から{{ill|Kōnin|ja|弘仁|12=draft}}に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[899]] {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft}}) – 群盗横行のため、{{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国|12=draft}} の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|12=draft}}・{{ill|Ueno Province|ja|上野国|12=draft}} {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|12=draft}} に関を設置. * {{ill|Katei|ja|嘉禎|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1235]] {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Earthquake|ja|地震|12=draft}} 頻発のため、{{ill|Bunryaku|ja|文暦|12=draft}} から{{ill|Katei|ja|嘉禎|12=draft}}に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Shōchū|ja|正中|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1324]] {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|12=draft}}. {{ill|Rokuhara Tandai|ja|六波羅探題|12=draft}} dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|12=draft}}—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|12=draft}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1870]] {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Commoners|ja|平民|12=draft}} were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|12=draft}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1842]] {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|12=draft}}, a diplomat, member of the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|12=draft}}, and politician (died [[1906]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1368]] {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|12=draft}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[1306]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]]

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Events == * {{ill|Kōnin|ja|弘仁|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[810]] {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Daidō|ja|大同|12=draft}} から{{ill|Kōnin|ja|弘仁|12=draft}}に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Shōtai|ja|昌泰|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[899]] {{ill|October 27|ja|10月27日|12=draft}}) – 群盗横行のため、{{ill|Sagami Province|ja|相模国|12=draft}} の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|12=draft}}・{{ill|Ueno Province|ja|上野国|12=draft}} {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|12=draft}} に関を設置. * {{ill|Katei|ja|嘉禎|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1235]] {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Earthquake|ja|地震|12=draft}} 頻発のため、{{ill|Bunryaku|ja|文暦|12=draft}} から{{ill|Katei|ja|嘉禎|12=draft}}に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Shōchū|ja|正中|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1324]] {{ill|October 7|ja|10月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|12=draft}}. {{ill|Rokuhara Tandai|ja|六波羅探題|12=draft}} dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of {{ill|Emperor Godaigo|ja|後醍醐天皇|12=draft}}—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|12=draft}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1870]] {{ill|October 13|ja|10月13日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Commoners|ja|平民|12=draft}} were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|12=draft}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1842]] {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|12=draft}}, a diplomat, member of the {{ill|Kazoku|ja|華族|12=draft}}, and politician (died [[1906]]).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|ja|応安|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1368]] {{ill|October 31|ja|10月31日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|12=draft}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[1306]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十九]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar September]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Days 19 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:translated pages]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:September 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 19일]] [[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:九月十九]] [[en:draft:September 19 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:September 19 (Lunisolar)]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月19日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の19日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[弘仁]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[810年]][[10月20日]]） - [[大同 (日本)|大同]]から弘仁に[[改元]] * [[昌泰]]2年（ユリウス暦[[899年]][[10月27日]]） - 群盗横行のため、[[相模国]]足柄坂・[[上野国]][[碓氷峠|碓氷坂]]に関を設置 * [[嘉禎]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1235年]][[11月1日]]） - [[地震]]頻発のため[[文暦]]から嘉禎に改元 * [[正中 (元号)|正中]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1324年]][[10月7日]]） - [[正中の変]]。[[六波羅探題]]が兵を遣し、[[鎌倉幕府]]討滅を企てた[[後醍醐天皇]]方の[[土岐頼兼]]、[[多治見国長]]らを討ち取る。[[日野資朝]]・[[日野俊基|俊基]]らを捕える * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[10月13日]]） - [[平民]]も[[苗字]]を附けることが許される。5年後に義務化
== 誕生日 == *[[天保]]13年（グレゴリオ暦[[1842年]][[10月22日]]） - [[長岡護美]]、[[外交官]]、[[華族]]、[[政治家]]（+ [[1906年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]23年（ユリウス暦[[1368年]][[10月31日]]） - [[上杉憲顕]]、[[関東管領]]（* [[1306年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十九]][[zh:九月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840324]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 19|qq=September 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] から[[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Shōtai|Shōtai]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:899|899]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]]) – 群盗横行のため、[[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashigara Saka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足柄峠|1=Ashigara Pass|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636901}}・[[:en:Kōzuke Province|Ueno Province]] {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usui Saka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に関を設置. * [[:en:Katei|Katei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1235|1235]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]]) – [[:en:Earthquake|Earthquake]] 頻発のため、[[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] から[[:en:Katei|Katei]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Culmination|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1324|1324]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōchū Rebellion|qq=|1=Shōchū Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11007252}}. [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]]—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toki Yorikane|qq=|1=Yorikane Toki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28692393}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajimi Kuninaga|qq=|1=Kuninaga Tajimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430852}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Mototomo|qq=|1=Hino Suketomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510642}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|qq=|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – [[:en:Commoner|Commoners]] were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Family name|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名字|1=myōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q69634220}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]]) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|qq=|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]], and politician (died [[:en:1906|1906]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]]) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|qq=|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[:en:1306|1306]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] から[[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Shōtai|Shōtai]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:899|899]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]]) – 群盗横行のため、[[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashigara Saka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足柄峠|1=Ashigara Pass|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636901}}・[[:en:Kōzuke Province|Ueno Province]] {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usui Saka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に関を設置. * [[:en:Katei|Katei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1235|1235]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]]) – [[:en:Earthquake|Earthquake]] 頻発のため、[[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] から[[:en:Katei|Katei]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Culmination|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1324|1324]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōchū Rebellion|qq=|1=Shōchū Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11007252}}. [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]]—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toki Yorikane|qq=|1=Yorikane Toki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28692393}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajimi Kuninaga|qq=|1=Kuninaga Tajimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430852}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Mototomo|qq=|1=Hino Suketomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510642}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|qq=|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – [[:en:Commoner|Commoners]] were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Family name|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名字|1=myōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q69634220}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]]) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|qq=|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]], and politician (died [[:en:1906|1906]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]]) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|qq=|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[:en:1306|1306]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] から[[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Shōtai|Shōtai]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:899|899]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]]) – 群盗横行のため、[[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashigara Saka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足柄峠|1=Ashigara Pass|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636901}}・[[:en:Kōzuke Province|Ueno Province]] {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usui Saka|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に関を設置. * [[:en:Katei|Katei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1235|1235]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]]) – [[:en:Earthquake|Earthquake]] 頻発のため、[[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] から[[:en:Katei|Katei]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|qq=|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Culmination|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1324|1324]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōchū Rebellion|qq=|1=Shōchū Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11007252}}. [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]]—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toki Yorikane|qq=|1=Yorikane Toki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28692393}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajimi Kuninaga|qq=|1=Kuninaga Tajimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430852}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Mototomo|qq=|1=Hino Suketomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510642}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|qq=|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – [[:en:Commoner|Commoners]] were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Family name|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名字|1=myōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q69634220}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]]) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|qq=|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]], and politician (died [[:en:1906|1906]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]]) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|qq=|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[:en:1306|1306]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十九]][[zh:九月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840324]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 19|qq=September 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] から[[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Shōtai|Shōtai]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:899|899]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]]) – 群盗横行のため、[[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashigara Saka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足柄峠|1=Ashigara Pass|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636901}}・[[:en:Kōzuke Province|Ueno Province]] {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usui Saka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に関を設置. * [[:en:Katei|Katei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1235|1235]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]]) – [[:en:Earthquake|Earthquake]] 頻発のため、[[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] から[[:en:Katei|Katei]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Culmination|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1324|1324]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōchū Rebellion|1=Shōchū Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11007252}}. [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]]—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toki Yorikane|1=Yorikane Toki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28692393}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajimi Kuninaga|1=Kuninaga Tajimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430852}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Mototomo|1=Hino Suketomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510642}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – [[:en:Commoner|Commoners]] were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Family name|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名字|1=myōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q69634220}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]]) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]], and politician (died [[:en:1906|1906]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]]) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[:en:1306|1306]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919|qq=}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十九]][[zh:九月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840324]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 19|qq=September 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] から[[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Shōtai|Shōtai]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:899|899]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]]) – 群盗横行のため、[[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashigara Saka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足柄峠|1=Ashigara Pass|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636901}}・[[:en:Kōzuke Province|Ueno Province]] {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usui Saka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に関を設置. * [[:en:Katei|Katei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1235|1235]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]]) – [[:en:Earthquake|Earthquake]] 頻発のため、[[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] から[[:en:Katei|Katei]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Culmination|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1324|1324]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōchū Rebellion|1=Shōchū Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11007252}}. [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]]—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toki Yorikane|1=Yorikane Toki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28692393}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajimi Kuninaga|1=Kuninaga Tajimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430852}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Mototomo|1=Hino Suketomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510642}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – [[:en:Commoner|Commoners]] were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Family name|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名字|1=myōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q69634220}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]]) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]], and politician (died [[:en:1906|1906]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]]) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[:en:1306|1306]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十九]][[zh:九月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840324]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 19|qq=September 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] から[[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Shōtai|Shōtai]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:899|899]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]]) – 群盗横行のため、[[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashigara Saka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足柄峠|1=Ashigara Pass|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636901}}・[[:en:Kōzuke Province|Ueno Province]] {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usui Saka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に関を設置. * [[:en:Katei|Katei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1235|1235]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]]) – [[:en:Earthquake|Earthquake]] 頻発のため、[[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] から[[:en:Katei|Katei]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Culmination|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1324|1324]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōchū Rebellion|1=Shōchū Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11007252}}. [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]]—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toki Yorikane|1=Yorikane Toki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28692393}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajimi Kuninaga|1=Kuninaga Tajimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430852}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Mototomo|1=Hino Suketomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510642}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – [[:en:Commoner|Commoners]] were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Family name|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名字|1=myōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q69634220}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]]) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]], and politician (died [[:en:1906|1906]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]]) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[:en:1306|1306]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十九]][[zh:九月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840324]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 19|qq=September 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] から[[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Shōtai|Shōtai]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:899|899]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]]) – 群盗横行のため、[[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashigara Saka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足柄峠|1=Ashigara Pass|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636901}}・[[:en:Kōzuke Province|Ueno Province]] {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usui Saka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に関を設置. * [[:en:Katei|Katei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1235|1235]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]]) – [[:en:Earthquake|Earthquake]] 頻発のため、[[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] から[[:en:Katei|Katei]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Culmination|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1324|1324]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōchū Rebellion|1=Shōchū Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11007252}}. [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]]—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toki Yorikane|1=Yorikane Toki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28692393}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajimi Kuninaga|1=Kuninaga Tajimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430852}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Mototomo|1=Hino Suketomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510642}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – [[:en:Commoner|Commoners]] were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Family name|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名字|1=myōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q69634220}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]]) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]], and politician (died [[:en:1906|1906]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]]) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[:en:1306|1306]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十九]][[zh:九月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十九]][[zh:九月十九]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十九]][[zh:九月十九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840324]] Wikidata name: 19th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 19|qq=September 19}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] から[[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Shōtai|Shōtai]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:899|899]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]]) – 群盗横行のため、[[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashigara Saka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足柄峠|1=Ashigara Pass|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636901}}・[[:en:Kōzuke Province|Ueno Province]] {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usui Saka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に関を設置. * [[:en:Katei|Katei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1235|1235]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]]) – [[:en:Earthquake|Earthquake]] 頻発のため、[[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] から[[:en:Katei|Katei]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Culmination|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1324|1324]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōchū Rebellion|1=Shōchū Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11007252}}. [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]]—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toki Yorikane|1=Yorikane Toki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28692393}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajimi Kuninaga|1=Kuninaga Tajimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430852}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Mototomo|1=Hino Suketomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510642}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – [[:en:Commoner|Commoners]] were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Family name|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名字|1=myōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q69634220}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]]) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]], and politician (died [[:en:1906|1906]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]]) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[:en:1306|1306]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]]) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]], and politician (died [[:en:1906|1906]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]]) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[:en:1306|1306]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Datong (disambiguation)|Daidō]] から[[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Shōtai|Shōtai]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:899|899]] [[:en:October 27|October 27]]) – 群盗横行のため、[[:en:Sagami Province|Sagami Province]] の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashigara Saka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足柄峠|1=Ashigara Pass|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636901}}・[[:en:Kōzuke Province|Ueno Province]] {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usui Saka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に関を設置. * [[:en:Katei|Katei]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1235|1235]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]]) – [[:en:Earthquake|Earthquake]] 頻発のため、[[:en:Bunryaku|Bunryaku]] から[[:en:Katei|Katei]]に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * [[:en:Culmination|Shōchū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1324|1324]] [[:en:October 7|October 7]]) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōchū Rebellion|1=Shōchū Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11007252}}. [[:en:Rokuhara Tandai|Rokuhara Tandai]] dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Emperor Godaigo]]—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toki Yorikane|1=Yorikane Toki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28692393}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajimi Kuninaga|1=Kuninaga Tajimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430852}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Mototomo|1=Hino Suketomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510642}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – [[:en:Commoner|Commoners]] were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Family name|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名字|1=myōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q69634220}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]]) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the [[:en:Kazoku|Kazoku]], and politician (died [[:en:1906|1906]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:October 31|October 31]]) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born [[:en:1306|1306]]).

{{Not to be confused with|September 19|qq=September 19}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 19''' is the 19th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|WD=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|810|en|810|WD=Q23819|lt=810}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|WD=Q2959|lt=October 20}}) – {{ill|Datong (disambiguation)|en|Datong (disambiguation)|WD=Q295082|lt=Daidō}} から{{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|WD=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin}}に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Shōtai|en|Shōtai|WD=Q1324780|lt=Shōtai}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|899|en|899|WD=Q23734|lt=899}} {{ill|October 27|en|October 27|WD=Q2956|lt=October 27}}) – 群盗横行のため、{{ill|Sagami Province|en|Sagami Province|WD=Q1053732|lt=Sagami Province}} の{{ill|Ashigara Saka|ja|足柄坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashigara Saka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足柄峠|1=Ashigara Pass|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11636901}}・{{ill|Kōzuke Province|en|Kōzuke Province|WD=Q1054838|lt=Ueno Province}} {{ill|Usui Saka|ja|碓氷坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usui Saka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に関を設置. * {{ill|Katei|en|Katei|WD=Q651897|lt=Katei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1235|en|1235|WD=Q5425|lt=1235}} {{ill|November 1|en|November 1|WD=Q2997|lt=November 1}}) – {{ill|Earthquake|en|Earthquake|WD=Q7944|lt=Earthquake}} 頻発のため、{{ill|Bunryaku|en|Bunryaku|WD=Q1194125|lt=Bunryaku}} から{{ill|Katei|en|Katei|WD=Q651897|lt=Katei}}に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11498853}}. * {{ill|Culmination|en|Culmination|WD=Q611114|lt=Shōchū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1324|en|1324|WD=Q5773|lt=1324}} {{ill|October 7|en|October 7|WD=Q2926|lt=October 7}}) – {{ill|Shōchū Rebellion|ja|正中の変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōchū Rebellion|1=Shōchū Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11007252}}. {{ill|Rokuhara Tandai|en|Rokuhara Tandai|WD=Q938069|lt=Rokuhara Tandai}} dispatched troops and thwarted the forces of {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Emperor Godaigo}}—led by {{ill|Toki Yorikane|ja|土岐頼兼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toki Yorikane|1=Yorikane Toki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28692393}} and {{ill|Tajimi Kuninaga|ja|多治見国長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajimi Kuninaga|1=Kuninaga Tajimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11430852}}—capturing {{ill|Hino Mototomo|ja|日野資朝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Mototomo|1=Hino Suketomo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510642}} and {{ill|Hino Toshiki|ja|日野俊基|display=俊基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hino Toshiki|1=Hino Toshimoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11510567}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}}) – {{ill|Commoner|en|Commoner|WD=Q3443060|lt=Commoners}} were permitted to adopt a {{ill|Family name|ja|苗字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Family name|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 名字|1=myōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q69634220}}, a practice made mandatory in the 5th year thereafter.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}} {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}}) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the {{ill|Kazoku|en|Kazoku|WD=Q241734|lt=Kazoku}}, and politician (died {{ill|1906|en|1906|WD=Q2049|lt=1906}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|WD=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1368|en|1368|WD=Q6207|lt=1368}} {{ill|October 31|en|October 31|WD=Q2949|lt=October 31}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born {{ill|1306|en|1306|WD=Q5716|lt=1306}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|18|9|20|8|19|10|9|0919|qq=}}

== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842|1=1842}} {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22|1=October 22}}) – {{ill|Nagaoka Mamoru|ja|長岡護美|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagaoka Mamoru|1=Moriyoshi Nagaoka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7400176}}, a diplomat, member of the {{ill|Kazoku|en|Kazoku|WD=Q241734|lt=Kazoku|1=Kazoku}}, and politician (died {{ill|1906|en|1906|WD=Q2049|lt=1906|1=1906}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|WD=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era|1=Ōan}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1368|en|1368|WD=Q6207|lt=1368|1=1368}} {{ill|October 31|en|October 31|WD=Q2949|lt=October 31|1=October 31}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Norifusa|ja|上杉憲顕|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Uesugi Norifusa|1=Uesugi Noriaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11359188}}, a Kantō Kanryō (関東管領) (born {{ill|1306|en|1306|WD=Q5716|lt=1306|1=1306}}).
